title: hieracium calcareum subsp. trilacense
intro: Hieracium calcareum subsp. trilacense, a lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium calcareum plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium calcareum subsp. trilacense include relieving symptoms of eczema, acne, and other skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
